project.name: Ethica
philosophy: Ethica is the architecture — memories, kernel, tools. Not the model.
Memory is evolution — never delete, never edit, never control
Chat is conversation. Canvas is work. They never overlap.
Sovereign — local first, no cloud, no forced dependencies

environment.fallback_backend: Ollama (mistral — slow, use only if needed)

orchestration_kernel.concept: Ethica is the Orchestration Kernel — a conductor of tools. The model is just the voice box.

builtin_tools.run_code: Python subprocess execution — ready to test
